sentence_reviews.text: PCA, ICA, NMF, and manifold methods compress observations into fewer coordinates while preserving variance, independence, non-negativity, or neighborhood geometry.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning, linear factor models / PCA-related representation topics; PML PCA, ICA, NMF, and manifold learning / dimensionality reduction topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: The individual method characterizations are standard and supported by the cited textbook topics.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning and PML PCA/matrix factorization/dimensionality-reduction topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: PCA/NMF and related reductions directly use linear algebraic formulations.

sentence_reviews.text: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Linear algebra, Unsupervised learning.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.

sentence_reviews.text: PCA, ICA, NMF & manifold reduction rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Linear algebra.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning/PML PCA, NMF, matrix factorization, and manifold/dimensionality-reduction topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: Linear algebra is directly central to PCA/NMF and much dimensionality reduction.

sentence_reviews.text: PCA, ICA, NMF & manifold reduction follows the learning setup expressed by Unsupervised learning.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA unsupervised learning context; PML unsupervised dimensionality reduction topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: These methods are commonly unsupervised representation-learning/preprocessing methods.

sentence_reviews.text: PCA, ICA, NMF & manifold reduction consumes, emits, or organizes information using Embeddings & distributed representations.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning representation-learning and linear factor model topics; PML dimensionality reduction and embedding/manifold topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: Dimensionality reduction emits lower-dimensional vector representations; 'embeddings' is atlas terminology.
